meaning: vi.对酌,共饮,(亲切)交谈n.共饮,交谈
examples: I used to hobnob with the rich and famous.
Tom and his friends used to hobnob in the bar.
No newspaper was outraged by the chocolate Hobnob.
Such networks recognise that people want to hobnob with a chosen few, not to be spammed by random friend-requests.
For now the three hobnob in Courchevel with other billionaires and share the decisions about where to take the company.
